# Azoth

> JSX that evaluates to real DOM — no virtual DOM, no reconciler, no render
> cycle. Components run once; updates are wired channels (async values into
> slots, rerenderers, direct DOM mutation). npm: `azoth`.

The self-sufficient guide for writing azoth code (also shipped inside the
npm package at `node_modules/azoth/llms.md`):

- [LLM guide](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/azothjs/azoth/main/packages/azoth/llms.md):
  the one fact, the core model, every rule with verified examples, catch-and-correct

## The rules, as runnable tests

The conformance suite is the canonical reference — authored code with
frozen, verified output:

- [Test index](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/azothjs/azoth/main/packages/valhalla/index.md):
  topic → file map
- [Reading the tests](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/azothjs/azoth/main/packages/valhalla/README.md):
  anchor notation (`<!--az:N-->`), conventions
- [The {…} slot](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/azothjs/azoth/main/packages/valhalla/compose.test.tsx)
- [Component forms](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/azothjs/azoth/main/packages/valhalla/component-forms.test.tsx)
- [Channel + async sources](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/azothjs/azoth/main/packages/valhalla/channels.test.tsx)
- [Rerendering](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/azothjs/azoth/main/packages/valhalla/rerenderer.test.tsx)
- [Keyed lists](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/azothjs/azoth/main/packages/valhalla/keyed-list.test.tsx)

## Concepts

- [JSX as DOM](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/azothjs/azoth/main/docs/topics/jsx-as-dom.md)
- [Components](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/azothjs/azoth/main/docs/topics/components.md)
- [Frames](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/azothjs/azoth/main/docs/topics/frames.md):
  regions that manage their own structure on their own clock
- [Core rules map](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/azothjs/azoth/main/docs/design/core-rules.md)

## Optional

- [Intro article](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/azothjs/azoth/main/docs/articles/jsx-for-the-web-platform.md):
  the compile walkthrough and the layout-management model
- [Known limitations](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/azothjs/azoth/main/docs/topics/known-limitations.md)
- [Coming from React](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/azothjs/azoth/main/docs/topics/coming-from-react.md)
